audit_items.proof_trace: When `eligibleAssets.length > 0`, `_getAssetPrice(assetOut, true)` is called at L315 before any auction-start logic, and `_getAssetPrice` with `withValidation=true` reverts on zero or stale price (PriceManager.sol L410-414). When `eligibleAssets.length == 0`, only auction endings are processed and the assetOut price is never used in any computation, so skipping the check is correct by design.
